source_note: 用户于 2026-07-23 提供。完整文本已镜像到 styles/meme-ledger/references/licensed-golden-fulltexts/；文本为公开视频音轨的 ASR 原文，专名、数字、英文与同音字可能存在识别误差；用于内部 few-shot 分析与结构对齐，不可直接复用独特句子。

usage.read_before_drafting: Read the complete selected source text after selecting its Golden card and before writing the event mapping.
usage.read_all_when: Only when comparing, revising the style system, or the user explicitly asks for cross-template analysis.
usage.generation_boundary: Use narrative program, paragraph proportions, rhetorical placement, emotional curve and fine-grained expression patterns as internal reference; generate independent wording and event facts.
